summary: The probe falls back to well-known host `stockscanner-db` with database `stockscanner` — the actual dev/live stack (confirmed in docker-compose.yml). `db_engine` (session scope) calls `Base.metadata.create_all()` and `Base.metadata.drop_all()` on whatever URL the probe returns, so a test run in an environment where the real DB is reachable will DROP production/dev tables. Fix: restrict the probe to test-only databases (require a `TEST_DATABASE_URL` or a `_test`-suffixed dbname), or never run `drop_all`/`create_all` against a discovered (non-testcontainers) DB; at minimum exclude the live `stockscanner` db/host from `common_creds`/hostnames.
